info.name: KairoHR HRMS API
info.description:
Complete API collection for KairoHR Human Resource Management System.

**Base URL:** `http://localhost:3000/api/v1`

**Auth Flow:**
1. Run **Login** request — access token is auto-saved to `accessToken` variable
2. All protected endpoints use `Bearer {{accessToken}}` automatically

**Demo Credentials:**
- Admin: `admin@techcorp.com` / `Admin@123`
- HR Manager: `hr@techcorp.com` / `Admin@123`
- Manager: `manager@techcorp.com` / `Admin@123`
- Employee: `emp1@techcorp.com` / `Admin@123`

**Swagger Docs:** http://localhost:3000/api/docs

item.name: 🔐 Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — login, register, token management

item.name: 👤 Employees
item.description: Employee lifecycle management — create, update, onboarding, offboarding

item.name: 🏢 Organization
item.description: Organization profile, legal entities, locations, departments, policies

formdata.value: Employees may work from home up to 2 days per week...

item.name: ⏱️ Attendance
item.description: Attendance tracking — check-in/out, shifts, rosters, regularization

item.name: 🏖️ Leave
item.description: Leave management — types, applications, approvals, balances, calendar

item.name: 💰 Payroll
item.description: Payroll processing — salary templates, runs, payslips, loans, reimbursements

item.name: 💼 Recruitment
item.description: ATS — jobs, candidates, applications, interviews, offers

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Senior Backend Engineer",
  "description": "Build scalable microservices with NestJS and PostgreSQL.",
  "requirements": "5+ years Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS experience",
  "employmentType": "FULL_TIME",
  "experienceMin": 5,
  "experienceMax": 8,
  "salaryMin": 1500000,
  "salaryMax": 2500000,
  "location": "Mumbai / Remote",
  "vacancies": 2
}

{
  "rating": 4,
  "recommendation": "HIRE",
  "strengths": "Strong system design skills",
  "improvements": "Could improve communication",
  "notes": "Good candidate overall"
}

item.description: Meeting management — schedule, rooms, calendar, analytics
